product: Email Notifications for Service Principal Tokens
tagline: Automated alerts for expiring tokens enhance security management.
what_it_does: Databricks now sends automatic email notifications to workspace admins when service principal tokens are within seven days of expiration. This feature applies to tokens with a lifetime greater than seven days that have been used at least once, requiring no additional configuration from the user. The notifications help ensure that admins are aware of impending token expirations, allowing for timely management.
why_it_matters: This feature significantly enhances security governance by ensuring that admins are promptly informed about expiring tokens, reducing the risk of service disruptions due to expired tokens. It streamlines the management of service principal tokens, ultimately improving operational efficiency and compliance.
plain_summary: Databricks now sends automatic email notifications to workspace admins when service principal tokens are within seven days of expiration. This feature applies to tokens with a lifetime greater than seven days that have been used at least once, requiring no…

capabilities.title: Automatic Notifications
capabilities.desc: Admins receive email alerts for expiring service principal tokens.

capabilities.title: No Configuration Required
capabilities.desc: The feature works out of the box without any setup needed.

capabilities.title: Token Usage Tracking
capabilities.desc: Notifications are only sent for tokens that have been used at least once.

capabilities.title: Lifetime Management
capabilities.desc: Alerts are triggered for tokens with a lifetime greater than seven days.

prerequisites: Admin privileges are required to manage personal access tokens.
Tokens must have a lifetime greater than seven days.
use_cases: Ensuring timely renewal of service principal tokens to avoid service interruptions.
Improving compliance with security policies regarding token management.
Facilitating proactive management of access credentials in CI/CD workflows.
limitations: Notifications are only sent for tokens that have been used at least once.
Feature is currently in Beta and may have limited support.

steps.title: Verify Admin Role
steps.desc: Ensure you have admin privileges in the Databricks workspace.

steps.title: Monitor Token Usage
steps.desc: Check the usage of service principal tokens to ensure they are active.

steps.title: Review Notifications
steps.desc: Look for email notifications regarding expiring tokens.

steps.title: Renew Tokens
steps.desc: Take action to renew or replace tokens before they expire.

steps.title: Audit Token Lifetimes
steps.desc: Regularly review token lifetimes to ensure compliance with security policies.

key_takeaway: Automated email notifications for expiring service principal tokens enhance security and operational efficiency for Databricks admins.
